acceptance.assertion: The experiment compares at least no-rLens, reading-pack, context-pack, and trace-gated conditions.
Metrics include unsupported claims, hallucinated paths, missing evidence, and rework count.

goal: Run a Vibe-Lab comparison of no-rLens, reading-pack, context-pack, full-dump, and trace-gated conditions before promoting a default access level.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Vibe-Lab PR #296: seeded the rLens agent-context condition measurement design and guard without claiming executed comparison results or default access readiness.
validation: Vibe-Lab PR #296 GitHub CI passed: validate, validate-doc-freshness-registry, bundle-freshness-receipt, ephemeral-diagnostics, non-blocking-diagnostics; claude skipped by workflow condition.
Codex review P2 on missing CI wiring was addressed by adding explicit workflow steps for validate-rlens-agent-context-conditions-tests and validate-rlens-agent-context-conditions.
Local post-merge: python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_promotion_readiness.py -> dry-run report unchanged, new experiment held as designed_not_executed.
Local post-merge: make generate-blocking -> unchanged/generated blocking artifacts current.

verified_acceptance.conditions: measurement-plan.yml compares no_rlens, reading_pack, context_pack, full_dump, and trace_gated; full_dump is diagnostic_only and not a default candidate.
verified_acceptance.metrics: measurement-plan.yml defines unsupported_claim_count, hallucinated_path_count, missing_evidence_count, rework_count, stale_context_claim_count, preparation/review timing, and evidence_quality_score; promotion remains blocked until comparable runs exist.

metadata.boundary: Design and guard only. No condition run was executed; no rLens superiority, default access readiness, agent quality improvement, or repo-understanding improvement is established.

title: Measure rLens agent-context conditions in Vibe-Lab
